view.panels.AbstractDataPanel

Package
Description
view.pages
 
view.panels
 

  • Uses of AbstractDataPanel in view.pages

    Fields in view.pages with type parameters of type AbstractDataPanel
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected ArrayList<AbstractDataPanel<DataT>>
    AbstractCollectionPage.dataPanels
    The list of data panels displayed inside the content area.
    Methods in view.pages that return AbstractDataPanel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected abstract AbstractDataPanel<DataT>
    AbstractCollectionPage.buildDataPanel(DataT item)
    Subclasses must implement this to create a panel for a single data item.
    protected AbstractDataPanel<Task>
    ChecklistPage.buildDataPanel(Task task)
    Constructs a data panel for each displayed task based on the current display mode.
    protected AbstractDataPanel<Checklist>
    WorkspacePage.buildDataPanel(Checklist checklist)
    Creates and returns a ChecklistPanel to display the checklist and provide item-level interactions.

    Subclasses of AbstractDataPanel in view.panels
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ChecklistPanel
    Defines a panel that visually represents a Checklist object.
    class 
    TaskCardPanel
    Defines a panel that visually represents a Task in the application.
    class 
    TaskTextPanel
    Defines a data panel for displaying a single Task as text.
